column1: # ZAP Rules File — Alert Filtering & False Positive Management
# Format: TSV (Tab Separated Values)
# Kolom: Alert ID \t New Severity \t Notes
# Alert ID:  ID dari ZAP alert (angka)
# New Severity: 0 = INFO, 1 = LOW, 2 = MEDIUM, 3 = HIGH (IGNORE = -1)
# Notes:        Alasan kenapa alert di-ignore atau di-lower severity
# Cara mendapatkan Alert ID:
#   1. Jalankan ZAP scan
#   2. Buka report HTML atau JSON
#   3. Cari "alertId" atau "pluginId" di setiap alert
# Referensi: https://www.zaproxy.org/docs/desktop/ui/dialogs/options/alertfilters/
# ── False Positives untuk Static Site (Vaject) ──────────────────────
